entries.summary: Phase 4 complete — startup optimizations added to main.js (7 Chromium flags). Single task, no issues.
lessons_learned: Single-task phases run quickly — no ceremony needed beyond the mandatory gates

entries.summary: Extended preload.js with extractDocx and onOpenFile contextBridge entries. Single task, zero revisions.
lessons_learned: contextBridge additions are straightforward — ipcRenderer.invoke for request/response, ipcRenderer.on for push events
Preload is the trust boundary — no client-side validation needed, that belongs in main process
IPC method naming convention: entity:action pattern (docx:extract, open-file) is clear and consistent
